farmer.dashboard.title: Farmer Dashboard
farmer.dashboard.description: Your central hub for managing your farming activities, viewing market prices, and tracking your listings.

steps.title: View Market Prices
steps.content: The top section shows current market prices for your crops. Tap any crop to see price trends and forecasts.

steps.title: Check Your Listings
steps.content: See your active produce listings and their current status. Green means active, yellow means pending review.

steps.title: Review Matches
steps.content: New buyer matches appear as notifications. Tap to see buyer details and respond to their interest.

tips: Keep your listings updated with accurate quantities to get better buyer matches.
Check market prices daily to set competitive prices for your produce.

faq.question: How do I update my crop prices?
faq.answer: Go to Listings, tap the listing you want to update, then tap Edit Price. Your new price will be visible to buyers immediately.

faq.question: Why am I not getting matches?
faq.answer: Make sure your listings are active, your location is set correctly, and your prices are competitive with market rates.

farmer.listings.title: My Listings
farmer.listings.description: Create and manage your produce listings. Buyers can discover your products through the marketplace.

steps.title: Create a New Listing
steps.content: Tap the + button to add a new produce listing. Fill in the crop type, quantity, price, and harvest date.

steps.title: Add Photos
steps.content: Upload clear photos of your produce. Listings with photos get 3x more buyer interest.

steps.title: Set Your Price
steps.content: Enter your asking price per kilogram. You can see the current market rate for reference.

steps.title: Publish
steps.content: Review your listing details and tap Publish. Your listing will be visible to buyers in your area.

tips: Add at least 2 photos to your listing for better visibility.
Set harvest dates accurately so buyers can plan their purchases.
Use the market price reference to set competitive prices.

faq.question: Can I edit a listing after publishing?
faq.answer: Yes, tap the listing and select Edit. You can update price, quantity, and photos at any time.

faq.question: How long do listings stay active?
faq.answer: Listings remain active until you mark them as sold or until the harvest date passes.

farmer.matches.title: Buyer Matches
farmer.matches.description: View and manage buyer matches for your produce listings. GoviHub automatically connects you with interested buyers.

steps.title: Review Match Details
steps.content: Each match shows the buyer's name, quantity needed, and offered price. Tap to see full details.

steps.title: Accept or Negotiate
steps.content: You can accept a match directly or send a counter-offer with your preferred terms.

steps.title: Confirm Delivery
steps.content: Once agreed, confirm the delivery date and location with the buyer.

tips: Respond to matches quickly - buyers often contact multiple farmers.
Check the buyer's rating before accepting a match.

faq.question: What happens after I accept a match?
faq.answer: The buyer will be notified and you'll both receive contact details to arrange delivery.

faq.question: Can I decline a match?
faq.answer: Yes, tap the match and select Decline. You can optionally provide a reason.

farmer.diagnosis.title: Crop Diagnosis
farmer.diagnosis.description: Use AI-powered diagnosis to identify crop diseases and pests. Take a photo and get instant recommendations.

steps.title: Take a Photo
steps.content: Tap the camera button and photograph the affected part of your crop. Ensure good lighting and focus.

steps.title: Select Crop Type
steps.content: Choose the type of crop from the dropdown to improve diagnosis accuracy.

steps.title: Get Results
steps.content: The AI will analyze your photo and provide a diagnosis with treatment recommendations.

tips: Take close-up photos of affected leaves or stems for better diagnosis accuracy.
Include both healthy and affected parts in the photo for comparison.
Use the diagnosis history to track recurring issues.

faq.question: How accurate is the AI diagnosis?
faq.answer: The AI provides a confidence score with each diagnosis. For critical issues, we recommend consulting a local agricultural officer.

faq.question: Can I save diagnosis results?
faq.answer: Yes, all diagnoses are automatically saved in your history for future reference.

farmer.advisory.title: Farm Advisory
farmer.advisory.description: Get personalized farming advice based on your location, crops, and weather conditions.

steps.title: Set Your Farm Profile
steps.content: Enter your farm details including location, soil type, and current crops for personalized advice.

steps.title: Browse Advisories
steps.content: View weather alerts, pest warnings, and seasonal farming tips relevant to your area.

steps.title: Ask Questions
steps.content: Use the chat feature to ask specific farming questions and get expert guidance.

tips: Enable notifications to receive timely weather and pest alerts.
Check the advisory section before each planting season for best practices.

faq.question: Are the advisories specific to my area?
faq.answer: Yes, advisories are tailored to your registered district and the crops you grow.

farmer.marketplace.title: Marketplace
farmer.marketplace.description: Browse supplies, equipment, and services available from verified suppliers in your area.

steps.title: Search Products
steps.content: Use the search bar or browse categories to find fertilizers, seeds, tools, and equipment.

steps.title: Compare Prices
steps.content: View prices from multiple suppliers and check ratings before purchasing.

steps.title: Place an Order
steps.content: Select the quantity needed and confirm your order. The supplier will arrange delivery.

tips: Compare prices from multiple suppliers to get the best deal.
Check supplier ratings and reviews before ordering.

faq.question: How do I pay for marketplace orders?
faq.answer: Payment is arranged directly with the supplier. GoviHub facilitates the connection but does not process payments.

farmer.more.title: More Options
farmer.more.description: Access your profile, settings, language preferences, and support options.

steps.title: Edit Profile
steps.content: Update your name, phone number, farm location, and the crops you grow.

steps.title: Change Language
steps.content: Switch between English and Sinhala using the language toggle.

steps.title: Get Support
steps.content: Contact our support team or browse help articles for assistance.

tips: Keep your profile updated to receive the most relevant matches and advisories.

faq.question: How do I change my phone number?
faq.answer: Go to Edit Profile, update your phone number, and verify it with the OTP sent to the new number.

buyer.dashboard.title: Buyer Dashboard
buyer.dashboard.description: Overview of your buying activity, active demands, and matched farmer listings.

steps.title: View Active Demands
steps.content: See your current purchase demands and how many farmer matches each has received.

steps.title: Check New Matches
steps.content: Review newly matched farmers who have produce meeting your requirements.

steps.title: Track Orders
steps.content: Monitor the status of your confirmed purchases and upcoming deliveries.

tips: Create specific demands with clear quantity and quality requirements for better matches.
Respond to farmer matches promptly to secure the best produce.

faq.question: How are matches generated?
faq.answer: GoviHub uses AI to match your demand requirements with farmer listings based on crop type, quantity, location, and price.

buyer.demands.title: My Demands
buyer.demands.description: Create and manage your produce purchase demands. Farmers will be matched to your requirements.

steps.title: Create a Demand
steps.content: Tap + to specify what produce you need, the quantity, your budget, and preferred delivery dates.

steps.title: Set Quality Requirements
steps.content: Specify any quality grades, certifications, or special requirements.

steps.title: Review Matches
steps.content: As farmers match your demand, review their offers and select the best fit.

tips: Be flexible with delivery dates to get more matches.
Set a realistic price range based on current market prices.

faq.question: Can I have multiple active demands?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create as many demands as you need for different crops or requirements.

buyer.matches.title: Farmer Matches
buyer.matches.description: View farmers matched to your demands and manage your connections.

steps.title: Review Farmer Profiles
steps.content: Check each farmer's rating, location, and available produce before connecting.

steps.title: Send an Offer
steps.content: Send your offer with the quantity and price you're willing to pay.

steps.title: Confirm Deal
steps.content: Once both parties agree, confirm the deal and arrange logistics.

tips: Farmers closer to your location mean lower transport costs.
Building relationships with reliable farmers leads to consistent supply.

faq.question: How do I rate a farmer?
faq.answer: After a completed transaction, you'll receive a prompt to rate your experience.

buyer.marketplace.title: Marketplace
buyer.marketplace.description: Browse all available produce listings from farmers across the platform.

steps.title: Browse Listings
steps.content: View all available produce sorted by freshness, price, or proximity to your location.

steps.title: Filter Results
steps.content: Use filters to narrow down by crop type, price range, quantity, and location.

steps.title: Contact Farmer
steps.content: Tap a listing to view details and send an inquiry to the farmer.

tips: Use location filters to find farmers near your delivery points.
Check listing photos to assess produce quality before contacting.

faq.question: What is the difference between Demands and Marketplace?
faq.answer: Demands let farmers come to you based on your requirements. Marketplace lets you browse and find specific farmer listings directly.

buyer.more.title: More Options
buyer.more.description: Manage your profile, business details, and application settings.

steps.title: Business Profile
steps.content: Update your business name, registration details, and delivery addresses.

steps.title: Notification Settings
steps.content: Configure which alerts you want to receive - new matches, price changes, etc.

tips: Complete your business profile to build trust with farmers.

supplier.dashboard.title: Supplier Dashboard
supplier.dashboard.description: Manage your agricultural supply business - track listings, orders, and customer inquiries.

steps.title: View Active Listings
steps.content: See all your current product listings and their performance metrics.

steps.title: Check Inquiries
steps.content: Review new inquiries from farmers interested in your products.

steps.title: Monitor Sales
steps.content: Track your sales performance and popular products.

tips: Keep stock quantities updated to avoid order cancellations.
Respond to inquiries within 24 hours for best conversion.

faq.question: How do I boost my listing visibility?
faq.answer: Ensure your listings have clear photos, accurate descriptions, and competitive prices.

supplier.listings.title: Product Listings
supplier.listings.description: Create and manage your supply product listings - fertilizers, seeds, tools, and equipment.

steps.title: Add a Product
steps.content: Tap + to create a new listing. Include product name, category, price, and availability.

steps.title: Upload Images
steps.content: Add high-quality product photos. Include packaging details and brand information.

steps.title: Set Pricing
steps.content: Enter your price and any bulk discount tiers you offer.

tips: Offer bulk pricing tiers to attract larger orders from commercial farmers.
Keep product descriptions detailed and accurate.

faq.question: Can I import products in bulk?
faq.answer: Currently, products need to be added individually. Bulk import is coming in a future update.

supplier.inquiries.title: Customer Inquiries
supplier.inquiries.description: View and respond to inquiries from farmers about your products.

steps.title: Review Inquiries
steps.content: Each inquiry shows the farmer's name, product of interest, and quantity needed.

steps.title: Respond
steps.content: Reply with availability, pricing, and delivery options.

steps.title: Close the Sale
steps.content: Once the farmer confirms, mark the inquiry as converted.

tips: Quick response times lead to higher conversion rates.
Offer delivery options to increase your competitive advantage.

supplier.more.title: More Options
supplier.more.description: Manage your supplier profile, business details, and settings.

steps.title: Business Profile
steps.content: Update your company details, contact information, and delivery areas.

tips: Add your delivery coverage areas to help farmers find you.

admin.dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.dashboard.description: System-wide overview of GoviHub platform metrics, user activity, and health indicators.

steps.title: Monitor KPIs
steps.content: View key platform metrics including active users, total listings, and match success rates.

steps.title: Review Alerts
steps.content: Check system alerts for issues requiring attention - flagged content, disputes, etc.

tips: Review the dashboard daily to catch issues early.

admin.users.title: User Management
admin.users.description: View, search, and manage all platform users - farmers, buyers, and suppliers.

steps.title: Search Users
steps.content: Use the search bar to find users by name, email, or phone number.

steps.title: View User Profile
steps.content: Tap a user to see their full profile, activity history, and account status.

steps.title: Manage Account
steps.content: Suspend, verify, or update user roles as needed.

admin.listings.title: Listings Management
admin.listings.description: Review and moderate all produce and supply listings on the platform.

steps.title: Filter Listings
steps.content: Use filters to view listings by status, type, or flagged content.

steps.title: Review Flagged
steps.content: Check flagged listings for policy violations and take appropriate action.

admin.matches.title: Match Management
admin.matches.description: Monitor and manage the AI matching system performance and outcomes.

steps.title: View Match Stats
steps.content: See match success rates, average response times, and conversion metrics.

admin.disputes.title: Dispute Resolution
admin.disputes.description: Review and resolve disputes between buyers and sellers on the platform.

steps.title: Review Dispute
steps.content: Read both parties' claims and supporting evidence.

steps.title: Make Decision
steps.content: Issue a resolution based on platform policies and evidence provided.

admin.feedback.title: User Feedback
admin.feedback.description: View and analyze user feedback submissions to improve the platform.

steps.title: Browse Feedback
steps.content: View all user feedback sorted by date, type, or sentiment.

steps.title: Respond
steps.content: Reply to feedback to let users know their input is valued.

admin.analytics.title: Platform Analytics
admin.analytics.description: Deep-dive analytics on platform usage, growth, and performance metrics.

steps.title: Select Date Range
steps.content: Choose the time period for your analysis using the date picker.

steps.title: Explore Metrics
steps.content: Navigate between different metric categories: Users, Listings, Matches, Revenue.

admin.settings.title: Platform Settings
admin.settings.description: Configure platform-wide settings, feature flags, and system parameters.

steps.title: General Settings
steps.content: Update platform name, description, and contact information.

steps.title: Feature Flags
steps.content: Enable or disable platform features for gradual rollout.
